overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character in 18th-century colonial dress walking through a historic town. The scene features cobblestone streets, brick and wooden buildings, and NPCs in period clothing, with colorful festival banners strung across the streets suggesting a celebration.

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square past seated NPCs, then turning right at the intersection toward the Auberge

man in dark coat standing near the green wooden building

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a sunlit town square with brick pavement, passing by wooden scaffolding and a seated NPC on a bench. The camera follows as the character approaches a cobblestone intersection and turns right near a building with an 'Auberge' sign, with various pedestrians scattered throughout the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street corner with historic inn and shops

events.description: character turns left around the corner of the red brick building

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street past the Auberge, then turning left around the corner of the red brick building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone street with the Auberge building on the right, passing pedestrians in period dress. After turning left around the red brick building corner, the street narrows slightly with wooden barricades and market stalls visible, leading toward a two-story wooden building in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with wooden barricades and festival decorations

events.description: entering narrower street section with wooden fences and dirt ground surface

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow street passing wooden barricades and market stalls, approaching the two-story building with colorful banners

man in dark clothing leaning against wooden barricade

entered.detail: green, yellow, and purple striped banners hanging across the street
tall wooden fence with lattice pattern on the right side
old wooden cart with broken wheels on the left side of street
white weathered wooden building with covered porch and columns

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrower street with dirt ground and wooden barricades on the left, passing under colorful festival banners. The two-story wooden building with a balcony dominates the left side as the character approaches, while a white wooden building with a porch appears on the right, and the ground transitions from cobblestone to dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cobblestone street approaching town courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking past the two-story wooden building and continuing through the open cobblestone street toward a courtyard area

woman in dark dress walking along the right sidewalk

entered.detail: open dirt courtyard with scattered wooden crates and barrels ahead
small white wooden building with brown roof in the distance
stack of wooden barrels near the building corner

segments.scene_description: The character passes the two-story wooden building and enters a more open cobblestone area with scattered pedestrians. The street widens as it approaches an open courtyard with small wooden buildings, wooden carts, and barrels visible, while the festival banners and barricades fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit town square into a narrower, more enclosed colonial street. It begins on brick pavement, gliding past wooden scaffolding and a seated NPC before the character approaches a cobblestone intersection. As the camera turns right by a building marked with an Auberge sign, the open square gives way to a street lined with pedestrians in period dress. The scene then shifts as the character rounds the corner of a red brick building, where the path narrows among wooden barricades and market stalls. Finally, the movement leads deeper into the town, heading toward a two-story wooden building in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, barricaded alleyway into a wide, bustling colonial courtyard. It begins as the character proceeds down a dirt path lined with wooden barricades and colorful festival banners, passing a prominent two-story wooden building with a balcony on the left and a white porch on the right. As the character moves forward, the dirt ground transitions back into cobblestone and the restrictive walls of the narrow street give way to a more open environment. The scene then expands into a spacious plaza where the banners and barricades fall behind, revealing scattered pedestrians and a collection of small wooden buildings. Finally, the camera opens up fully to show a lively courtyard filled with wooden carts and barrels.
